title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXL. Relics.
content:
Peg, peg, with a wooden leg,
            Her father was a miller:
        He tossed the dumpling at her head,
            And said he could not kill her.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DCXL. Relics." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
